home.usp_alternative_description: Discover secret paths, untouched landscapes, and authentic encounters away from tourist crowds
home.explore_djerba_description: Discover the magic of Djerba, where ancient history meets pristine Mediterranean beaches. Explore historic synagogues, colorful souks, and experience the unique blend of cultures that makes this island a true gem of Tunisia.
home.destinations_subtitle: From ancient oases to stunning coastlines, explore the diversity of our destinations
home.categories_subtitle: From desert marathons to cultural immersions, find your perfect adventure
home.custom_experience_description: Can't find exactly what you're looking for? We specialize in crafting personalized adventures tailored to your dreams. Tell us your vision, and our local experts will make it happen.
home.experience_types_subtitle: Whatever your passion, we have an adventure waiting for you
home.testimonials_title: They Experienced the Adventure with Us!

home.featured_package_1_description: Explore the enchanting Island of Dreams with pristine beaches, ancient history, and vibrant culture

checkout.currency_notice_why_tnd_title: Why will I see a different currency?
checkout.currency_notice_why_tnd_explanation: Clictopay is Tunisia's official national payment gateway. The payment page displays amounts in Tunisian Dinar (TND), but your card will be charged in your local currency.
checkout.currency_notice_tnd_simple: You will be securely redirected to Clictopay, Tunisia's official payment gateway, to complete your payment.
checkout.secure_payment_note: 256-bit SSL encrypted - Secured by Clictopay SMT
checkout.secure_payment_note_extended: 256-bit SSL encrypted - Clictopay is Tunisia's national payment system operated by SMT
checkout.currency_notice_message: The payment page will display the amount in TND ({tndAmount}). Don't worry - your card will be charged exactly {eurAmount} in your currency.
checkout.redirect_notice_tnd: You will be securely redirected to Clictopay, Tunisia's official payment gateway, to complete your payment. Your card will be charged exactly the amount shown above.
checkout.how_it_works_description: Similar to iDEAL, Bancontact, or SOFORT - you'll be redirected to a secure payment page. Your card will be charged in your local currency ({amount}).
checkout.how_it_works_general: Similar to iDEAL, Bancontact, or SOFORT - you'll be redirected to Clictopay's secure payment page to complete your transaction safely.

cookies.essential_description: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analytics_description: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
cookies.marketing_description: Used to deliver personalized advertisements relevant to you.

legal.privacy_meta_description: Learn how Go Adventure collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
legal.terms_meta_description: Read our terms of service governing the use of Go Adventure platform.
legal.cookies_meta_description: Learn about the cookies we use and how to manage your preferences.

privacy.introduction_text: At Go Adventure, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacy.data_collected_intro: We collect the following types of personal information:
privacy.data_collected_name: Name and contact details (first name, last name)
privacy.data_collected_payment: Payment information (processed securely through our payment providers)
privacy.data_collected_usage: Usage data and browsing behavior on our website
privacy.data_usage_intro: We use your personal information for the following purposes:
privacy.data_usage_communication: Communicating with you about your reservations
privacy.data_usage_improvement: Improving our services and website experience
privacy.data_sharing_intro: We may share your personal information with:
privacy.data_sharing_vendors: Activity vendors to fulfill your bookings
privacy.data_sharing_payment: Payment processors for secure transaction handling
privacy.data_sharing_legal: Legal authorities when required by law
privacy.retention_text: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy:
privacy.retention_bookings: Completed bookings: 7 years (for tax and legal compliance)
privacy.rights_intro: Under GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights:
privacy.rights_access: Right to access your personal data
privacy.rights_erasure: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
privacy.contact_text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer:

terms.introduction_text: Welcome to Go Adventure. These Terms of Service govern your use of our website and services. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.service_text: Go Adventure is an online marketplace that connects travelers with local activity providers. We facilitate the discovery, booking, and payment for tours, activities, and events across Tunisia.
terms.obligations_intro: When using our services, you agree to:
terms.obligations_accurate: Provide accurate and complete information when making bookings
terms.obligations_legal: Use the platform only for lawful purposes
terms.obligations_respect: Treat activity providers and other users with respect
terms.booking_text: When you make a booking through Go Adventure, you enter into a direct contractual relationship with the activity provider. We act as an intermediary to facilitate this transaction. All bookings are subject to availability and the specific terms of each activity provider.
terms.cancellation_text: Our standard cancellation policy is as follows (individual activities may have different policies):
terms.cancellation_48h: More than 48 hours before: Full refund
terms.cancellation_noshow: Less than 24 hours or no-show: No refund
terms.liability_text: Go Adventure acts as an intermediary between travelers and activity providers. While we carefully vet our partners, we are not liable for the actions, errors, or omissions of activity providers. We recommend travelers verify all activity details and purchase appropriate travel insurance.
terms.ip_text: All content on the Go Adventure platform, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of Go Adventure or our content providers and is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.law_text: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of Tunisia. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved in the courts of Tunis, Tunisia.
terms.contact_text: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

cookies_policy.introduction_text: This Cookie Policy explains how Go Adventure uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website. It explains what these technologies are, why we use them, and your rights to control our use of them.
cookies_policy.what_are_text: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide reporting information to website owners.
cookies_policy.essential_text: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually set in response to actions you take, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms.
cookies_policy.analytics_text: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve our site performance. They help us know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.
cookies_policy.marketing_text: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant advertisements on other sites.
cookies_policy.manage_text: You can manage your cookie preferences in several ways:
cookies_policy.manage_banner: Using our cookie preference banner when you first visit the site
cookies_policy.manage_browser: Through your browser settings to block or delete cookies
cookies_policy.third_party_text: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages. We do not control the use of these cookies. Please refer to the respective privacy policies of these third parties for more information.
cookies_policy.contact_text: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us:

about.title: About Us
about.meta_description: Discover Go Adventure - The digital extension of L'Aventurier brand for sustainable, active, and deeply human tourism in Tunisia.
about.hero_subtitle: Go Adventure is much more than a booking platform. It's the digital extension of our L'Aventurier brand, designed to offer sustainable, active, and deeply human tourism.
about.our_story: L'Aventurier: The Spirit of Meaningful Travel
about.founder_story: Originally from Djerba, Seif is the soul behind L'Aventurier and the creator of the GO Adventure platform. After earning a degree in accounting, he founded Jerba International Travel in 2009 before following his true passion: outdoor sports, nature, and human connection. Since 2018, he has become a major figure in Tunisia's trail running scene, bringing together a community of young talents, artisans, athletes, and local stakeholders to create tourism that is vibrant, responsible, and connected to what truly matters.
about.founder_quote: Through L'Aventurier, I want to offer more than just a trip: a reconnection — to nature, to others, and to oneself.
about.sustainable_desc: We prioritize soft mobility and local circuits, excluding high-impact practices like quad bikes and single-use plastics.
about.active_lifestyle_desc: We believe in movement as a driver of well-being: hiking, cycling, trail running, kayaking... all in preserved natural settings.
about.local_immersion_desc: Our itineraries are designed as human bridges. Meet, exchange, understand, and discover.
about.expertise_desc: Every experience is tested, validated, and thoughtfully designed by a dedicated team passionate about the field.
about.impact_desc: 1% of our profits goes to educational and solidarity projects supporting local youth.
about.team_desc: Behind Go Adventure is an entire community of young talents, women artisans, sports guides, farmers, and enthusiasts who bring each adventure to life. We believe tourism can become a positive force — for visitors, residents, and the region alike.
about.initiatives_desc: Beyond travel experiences, we carry out concrete actions to support local youth, preserve our heritage, and encourage Djerbian talents.
about.laventurier_intro: L'Aventurier is an initiative of Jerba International Travel.
about.laventurier_desc1: This project is the fruit of a dream: to discover Tunisia differently, through sport, nature and humanity.
about.laventurier_desc2: We imagine immersive and eco-responsible experiences, showcasing our territory, its artisans, its landscapes and its living heritage.
about.initiatives_bullet3: Highlighting social and solidarity economy actors

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.meta_description: Contact Go Adventure for questions about tours, bookings, or custom trip planning. We're here to help you plan your perfect Tunisian adventure.
contact_page.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.
